resource_overrides.rationale: PHQ-2 depression screening at well-woman GYN visit
PHQ-2 depression screening at preconception counseling visit
PHQ-2 depression screening at pregnancy/loss management visit
Positive PHQ-2 depression screening at prenatal visit
Pregnancy-related anxiety condition at reproductive health visit
Positive PHQ-2 screening and depression condition at APS results visit

rationale.enc-000: Well-woman GYN exam with Pap smear, HPV co-test, and contraception management
rationale.enc-001: Preconception counseling visit with OCP discontinuation and prenatal vitamin initiation
rationale.enc-002: First pregnancy confirmation with serial beta-hCG monitoring
rationale.enc-003: First pregnancy loss — spontaneous abortion at 6 weeks, expectant management
rationale.enc-004: Second pregnancy confirmation and subsequent missed abortion with RPL diagnosis
rationale.enc-005: Recurrent pregnancy loss workup — karyotyping, coagulation, and metabolic panel
rationale.enc-006: Third pregnancy confirmation with early ultrasound and progesterone supplementation
rationale.enc-007: Third pregnancy loss — missed abortion at 8 weeks, D&C with POC genetic testing
rationale.enc-008: APS antibody panel results review with specialist referrals for recurrent pregnancy loss
rationale.enc-009: Telephone follow-up coordinating MFM and hematology referrals for RPL/APS
rationale.enc-010: MFM consultation for high-risk pregnancy planning with suspected APS
rationale.enc-011: Telephone follow-up after MFM consultation — enoxaparin education and coordination
rationale.enc-012: Initial hematology consultation for APS evaluation in context of recurrent pregnancy loss
rationale.enc-013: Lab visit for confirmatory APS antibody testing and thrombophilia panel
rationale.enc-014: Hematology follow-up confirming APS diagnosis and anticoagulation planning for future pregnancy
